business_definition: Total count of prior authorization requests received.
Total count of requests with an approved status.
Total count of requests with a denied status.
Total count of requests approved after an appeal process.
The percentage of prior authorization requests that resulted in an approval status.
The percentage of prior authorization requests that resulted in a denial status.
The average number of hours taken to reach a decision from the time the request was received.
The median number of hours taken to reach a decision from the time the request was received.
The percentage of requests where the review timeframe was extended and the final determination was approved.
Average turnaround time for organization determinations in days.
Percentage of records missing key identifying fields.
Total count of validation warnings or errors in data.
Composite score representing data completeness and validation rate.

dax_expression: CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactEncounter), KEEPFILTERS('Total number of grievances'))
description: Total number of grievances

dax_expression: CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactEncounter), KEEPFILTERS('Total number of timely notifications of grievance decisions'))
description: Total number of timely notifications of grievance decisions

dax_expression: CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactEncounter), KEEPFILTERS('Number of expedited grievances'))
description: Number of expedited grievances

dax_expression: CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactEncounter), KEEPFILTERS('Number of dismissed grievances'))
description: Number of dismissed grievances

dax_expression: CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactEncounter), KEEPFILTERS('Number of completed organization determinations (fully favorable, partially favorable, adverse)'))
description: Number of completed organization determinations (fully favorable, partially favorable, adverse)

dax_expression: CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactEncounter), KEEPFILTERS('Number of completed reconsiderations (fully favorable, partially favorable, adverse)'))
description: Number of completed reconsiderations (fully favorable, partially favorable, adverse)

dax_expression: CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactEncounter), KEEPFILTERS('Number of withdrawn coverage requests'))
description: Number of withdrawn coverage requests

dax_expression: CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactEncounter), KEEPFILTERS('Number of dismissed coverage requests'))
description: Number of dismissed coverage requests

dax_expression: CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactEncounter), KEEPFILTERS('Number of reopened organization determinations and reconsiderations'))
description: Number of reopened organization determinations and reconsiderations

dax_expression: CALCULATE(COUNTROWS(FactEncounter), KEEPFILTERS('Employer Group Plan Sponsor enrollment count as of the last day of the reporting period'))
description: Employer Group Plan Sponsor enrollment count as of the last day of the reporting period
